description: Golden identifier set the automated pipeline should retrieve/resolve for the warfarin initial-dosing decision-support reference case. Third pilot golden; companion to golden_expected_ids.json (HRV) and golden_expected_ids_DR.json (DR). This is the first DRUG case (exercises the Drugs@FDA / drug-label path) and the second regulatory-NULL case (no FDA-authorized dosing algorithm exists - that grounded absence is the Field-7 finding, like HRV). Use in the ablation harness: score recall = golden ids present in the bundle's records (FDA codes EXACT; literature as a >=K resolvable-ID floor per COMPARISON.md Lesson 2), precision = on-topic rate. Every id in 'required' resolved live 2026-07-09 (PMIDs via E-utils, DOIs via Crossref, K-numbers via openFDA 510k, product codes via openFDA classification, NDA via openFDA drugsfda, NCTs via ClinicalTrials.gov v2; the null-evidence PMAs and the ANDA040616 SPL label also confirmed live).
reference_case: Algorithmic initial warfarin dose recommendation (and early adjustment) to reach/maintain target INR, using clinical variables +/- CYP2C9/VKORC1 pharmacogenomics; inpatient initiation and outpatient anticoagulation-clinic management

match_policy.required_min_coverage: All ids in 'required' should be present for full recall. 'field_grounding' is the per-field breakdown, following each source's role per the spec's SOURCE INVENTORY. Like DR (and unlike HRV), warfarin has a scored 'ncts' category: COAG / EU-PACT / GIFT are named load-bearing pivotal trials that ground Study Design and Sample Size. The two EU-PACT sibling arms are non-warfarin coumarins (phenprocoumon / acenocoumarol) and are recorded as related-context, NOT scored.
match_policy.resolution_pass: PMID -> E-utils esummary; DOI -> Crossref works; product_code -> openFDA classification; K/DEN/PMA -> openFDA 510k/De Novo/pma; NDA/ANDA -> openFDA drugsfda; SPL set_id -> openFDA drug/label; NCT -> ClinicalTrials.gov v2. A required id that fails to resolve is a TEST FAILURE, not a silent drop.
match_policy.regulatory_null: No FDA-cleared/approved warfarin dose-RECOMMENDATION algorithm exists. 510(k) searches return only CYP2C9/VKORC1 genotyping assays (product codes ODW/NSU) and a coagulation-management instrument (KQG, CoagCare K050821); no dosing algorithm. openFDA device/pma returns 4 warfarin records (P990037/P000037/P930038/P130013), all cardiovascular hardware, none a dosing tool. The PRESENCE of only adjacent input-validation devices + the ABSENCE of a dosing-algorithm device is the Field-7 assertion (parallels HRV).
match_policy.denovo_ruled_out: There is no /device/denovo endpoint, but every granted De Novo creates a new classification + product code that DOES surface in openFDA device/classification (verified this session: submission_type_id:3 returns 113 De Novo records). The classification search found NO warfarin dose-recommendation product code, so a De Novo-authorized dosing DEVICE is ruled out. Caveat: a function marketed under non-device CDS (21st Century Cures 520(o)) would carry no product code and is out of scope of this check - that stays the Field-7 determination. STANDARD DE NOVO METHOD for the whole slate: search device/classification for the candidate product code / device-name terms; absence there rules out a De Novo-authorized device (identifiable via submission_type_id:3).
match_policy.drug_label_note: The reference-drug APPLICATION record NDA009218 (Coumadin) resolves via openFDA drugsfda, but its openFDA drug/LABEL entry 404s (Coumadin predates structured product labeling). The pharmacogenomic dosing table lives on a current warfarin-sodium SPL label that DOES resolve (example: set_id 0cbce382-9c88-4f58-ae0f-532a841e8f95 under ANDA040616). Scoring targets the deterministic NDA009218 application record + 'a resolvable warfarin SPL label', NOT the exact set_id (many generic warfarin labels exist).

related_context_not_scored.note: Retrieved and verified live, but NOT part of the scored recall set.

eu_pact_sibling_arms.NCT01119274: EU-PACT phenprocoumon arm (COMPLETED, n=970) - non-warfarin coumarin
eu_pact_sibling_arms.NCT01119261: EU-PACT acenocoumarol arm (COMPLETED, n=970) - non-warfarin coumarin

warfarin_spl_label_example.note: Resolvable SPL carrying the CYP2C9/VKORC1 pharmacogenomic dosing table (grounds Field 7 where NDA009218's label 404s).

regulatory_null_evidence.note: Proof-of-ABSENCE identifiers: these confirm there is no dosing-algorithm device. They are NOT required app retrievals (surfacing them is a precision bonus, not a recall requirement).

pma_cardiovascular_hardware.P000037: LWQ - On-X Prosthetic Heart Valves (low-dose-warfarin registry)
pma_cardiovascular_hardware.P930038: MGB - Angio-Seal Hemostatic Puncture Closure Device
pma_cardiovascular_hardware.P130013: NGV - Watchman FLX Pro Left Atrial Appendage Closure

regulatory_null_evidence.denovo: No /device/denovo endpoint, but De Novo grants appear in device/classification (submission_type_id:3 = 113 records); no warfarin dose-recommendation product code exists there -> De Novo-authorized dosing device ruled out

1_study_design.note: Algorithm-derivation cohort (Gage 2008; IWPC 2009) + the pivotal genotype-guided-vs-clinical dosing RCTs (COAG, EU-PACT, GIFT). The comparator-arm choice is the central design lesson (EU-PACT positive vs COAG null hinged on it). RCT with a clinically-relevant anticoagulation endpoint is the reference design.

2_input_signal_validation.note: The two model inputs must be validated before the dose output is interpreted: (a) INR measurement via an FDA-cleared PT/INR assay (product code GJS) - concrete cleared device CoaguChek XS System, K062925 (Roche), the canonical point-of-care INR meter; (b) CYP2C9 (ODW) + VKORC1 (ODV) genotype CALL via cleared genotyping assays (ODW/NSU class; K073014, K070804, K073071, K073720, K110786). CPIC (28198005) specifies the allele set genotyping must cover. Alt INR meter: Coag-Sense K183255 (2019).

3_performance_benchmarks.note: Percent Time in Therapeutic Range by the Rosendaal linear-interpolation method (8470047) is the standard control metric; the RCTs report TTR / out-of-range time as the primary performance readout. No single codified numeric threshold - study-defined endpoints only.

4_ground_truth.note: Ground truth = measured INR trajectory reduced to TTR (Rosendaal) + adjudicated clinical events (major bleeding, thromboembolism, INR>=4). The 'correct dose' label is the achieved anticoagulation outcome, not a retrospectively-computed model dose. CPIC gives the genotype->starting-dose reference logic, not an outcome ground truth.

5_sample_size.note: Precedent enrollments (COAG 1015 / EU-PACT warfarin arm 455 / GIFT 1598) are calibration anchors; exact N is study-defined, powered to the initiation-period TTR difference.

6_subgroup.note: CYP2C9/VKORC1 genotype strata and ANCESTRY are load-bearing (IWPC derived multi-ancestry; CPIC flags ancestry-aware dosing; COAG's null was attributed partly to differential performance in a non-white subgroup - making ancestry mandatory, not exploratory). Age, body size, interacting drugs, indication.

7_regulatory.note: Regulatory NULL: no dosing-algorithm device. Treat as CDS/SaMD, gate on Cures Act 520(o) non-device-CDS criteria first. Adjacent cleared devices are genotyping assays (ODW/ODV/NSU) + a PT/INR assay (GJS; CoaguChek XS K062925) + a coagulation-management instrument (KQG, CoagCare K050821). Reference drug = Coumadin NDA009218 (drugsfda); its label 404s so the PGx dosing table is read off a current warfarin SPL (ANDA040616). PMA null (cardiovascular hardware only); De Novo ruled out via classification (no dose-recommendation product code; De Novo grants confirmed present under submission_type_id:3).

8_monitoring.note: Ongoing INR surveillance and TTR tracking (Rosendaal 8470047), stratified by genotype/ancestry (same axes as Field 6, given the trial-level subgroup divergence), via anticoagulation-clinic management workflow (CoagCare KQG, K050821). Input-signal integrity (INR QC, genotype call-rate) as a leading indicator. No mandated drift cadence retrieved (gap).

expected_conclusions.regulatory_class: No FDA-authorized warfarin dose-recommendation algorithm; treat as Clinical Decision Support / SaMD and gate on the 21st Century Cures Act 520(o) non-device-CDS criteria first. Adjacent cleared devices are Class II genotyping assays (ODW 862.3360 / NSU 862.2570), a Class II PT/INR test (GJS 864.7750), and a Class II coagulation instrument (KQG 864.5400).
expected_conclusions.reference_drug_nda: NDA009218 (Coumadin, Bristol Myers Squibb) - resolves via drugsfda; drug/label 404s (pre-SPL). PGx dosing table on a current warfarin SPL under ANDA040616.
expected_conclusions.benchmark_precedent_only: Percent Time in Therapeutic Range (Rosendaal method, PMID 8470047) is the accepted control metric, not a codified pass/fail threshold; the genotype-guided RCTs (COAG null, EU-PACT positive, GIFT positive-on-composite) show the benefit itself is contested - the comparator arm decides the result.

coverage_gaps_expected: De Novo for a standalone dosing DEVICE is ruled out via classification (no matching product code; De Novo grants confirmed present under submission_type_id:3); the only residual is whether the function is marketed as non-device CDS under Cures 520(o), which carries no product code - a policy/legal determination, not a database lookup
510(k) / PMA narrative decision-summary PDFs (accessdata.fda.gov; FDA-accepted acceptance criteria not readable via openFDA)
openFDA drug/label returned 404 for NDA009218 (pre-SPL legacy application; PGx table read off a current warfarin SPL under ANDA040616 instead)
Full-text per-trial TTR values / effect sizes (only PubMed metadata + Crossref resolved; numeric thresholds left study-defined)
PharmGKB / WarfarinDosing.org algorithm coefficients (not on the allowlisted API set)
Mandated post-market INR-drift / recalibration cadence for a dosing-CDS tool (none retrieved; flagged for expert review)
